narrative:
Mentor Ex Vill Sd (Lake) exempted village school district has 44,521 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.5%, a modest Republican lean of 3.5 percentage points.
